title: Steward + domain/advocate-reviewer outreach (status logged)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). The project needs a steward and domain/advocate/license reviewers; outreach must be initiated and its status logged honestly (no partner is yet secured).
objective: Initiate steward + domain/advocate-reviewer outreach and identify a qualified source-license reviewer candidate, logging targets, messages, and status.
acceptanceCriteria: Steward + domain/advocate-reviewer outreach initiated; targets and messages recorded.
Outreach status (contacted/responded/committed) logged and kept current.
A qualified source-license reviewer candidate is identified (hard M0-exit dependency; escalate per PLAN.md fallback if the seat stays empty).
output: docs/outreach-log.md recording steward/reviewer outreach targets and status, committed via PR.
